articles.title: Trump issues pardon to former Republican congressman convicted of insider trading - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump has issued a pardon to Stephen Buyer, a former Republican congressman from Indiana who served nearly two years in prison for making illegal stock trades based on inside information after he left office. Buyer sentenced to 22 months in p…
